Front: Problem: Valid Anagram (Easy) | Link: https://neetcode.io/problems/is-anagram | Trigger: check if two strings are anagrams
Back: Pattern: Frequency counting. Aha: anagrams have identical per-character counts. Logic: if lengths differ return False; compare Counter(s) == Counter(t) (or 26-count arrays). Edge cases: different lengths, repeated chars. Complexity: O(n) time, O(1) extra space for fixed alphabet.
